system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Arm Strike
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You smash your fist into your opponent, causing enough pain to disrupt concentration on Technique. Make an Arm Strike Skill roll against your opponent’s Parry. If you succeed make a normal Damage roll. If that is successful you strike with enough force that it hurts the target for 1 round per Rank of Waijia, causing them to take -1d10 to their Skill rolls (this only works against foes with fewer Qi Ranks than yourself). On a Total Success of the initial Arm Strike roll you do 1 Extra Wound as well. Cathartic: On a Cathartic Strike, your opponent also takes a -2 per Rank of Waijia to Parry and Evade, in addition to the normal -1d10 penalty to Skills. Again this only works against opponents with fewer Qi Ranks than yourself.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: On a Cathartic Strike, your opponent also takes a -2 per Rank of Waijia to Parry and Evade, in addition to the normal -1d10 penalty to Skills. Again this only works against opponents with fewer Qi Ranks than yourself.
